base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of doors_color_coded_6_types — a tile from 1986 metroid. Doors — 6 color-coded door types: Basic (blue) / Orange (rockets) / Blue (rockets alt) / Pink (Samus Suitless) / Red (Ridley-only) / Orange (Tourian-only). Color indicates required weapon/state to open. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Doors — 6 color-coded door types: Basic (blue) / Orange (rockets) / Blue (rockets alt) / Pink (Samus Suitless) / Red (Ridley-only) / Orange (Tourian-only). Color indicates required weapon/state to open
